risks.incoherence: generic documents after plan is known
model or plan change keeps old quote
por fuera interpreted as not eligible
moto del anuncio saved as model

detail_matrix.how_to_reproduce: User says quiero credito, then asks cuanto queda la model.
detail_matrix.recommended_test: Assert quote mode is credit or asks plan info; no cash-only quote.
detail_matrix.recommended_fix: Make quote.resolve mode mandatory and require snapshot before visible price.

detail_matrix.how_to_reproduce: Resolve plan 5, then ask que documentos necesito.
detail_matrix.recommended_test: Assert only plan 5 docs are returned.
detail_matrix.recommended_fix: Route document questions to requirements.retrieve and make FAQ refuse owned topics.

detail_matrix.how_to_reproduce: User passes seniority and gives plan but no model/quote.
detail_matrix.recommended_test: Assert bot asks model/quote path, not docs.
detail_matrix.recommended_fix: Docs request requires valid quote or explicit doc question/upload.

detail_matrix.how_to_reproduce: Save seniority true, next turn asks same question.
detail_matrix.recommended_test: Assert next step advances to plan/model.
detail_matrix.recommended_fix: Canonical aliases plus progress guard memory.

detail_matrix.incoherence: repeats income or plan already saved
detail_matrix.recommended_fix: Accept plan evidence once and use StateWriter aliases.

detail_matrix.how_to_reproduce: Quote model A, then user changes to model B.
detail_matrix.recommended_test: Assert previous quote invalidated and new quote required.
detail_matrix.recommended_fix: StateWriter invalidation must cover all live paths.

detail_matrix.incoherence: por fuera treated as not eligible
detail_matrix.how_to_reproduce: User says trabajo por fuera or sin comprobantes.
detail_matrix.recommended_test: Assert plan resolves to configured informal/no-comprobante path if eligible.
detail_matrix.recommended_fix: Tool-owned alias mapping with no auto reject.

detail_matrix.how_to_reproduce: User asks si tengo buro puedo.

detail_matrix.incoherence: ok/va/si after quote does not advance
detail_matrix.how_to_reproduce: Send quote, then user replies va.
detail_matrix.recommended_test: Assert soft close or docs next step, not reset.
detail_matrix.recommended_fix: Bind short acknowledgement to last quote context.

detail_matrix.how_to_reproduce: Show candidates, user says la primera.
detail_matrix.recommended_test: Assert selected candidate or clarification if memory missing.
detail_matrix.recommended_fix: Make candidate references part of catalog.retrieve state.

detail_matrix.incoherence: moto del anuncio saved as model
detail_matrix.how_to_reproduce: User says quiero la moto del anuncio.
detail_matrix.recommended_test: Assert no Moto write without canonical catalog match.
Assert handoff requires reason enum or policy threshold.
detail_matrix.recommended_fix: Handoff event contract with explicit reason.

detail_matrix.how_to_reproduce: User says ya mande papeles with no attachment.
detail_matrix.recommended_test: Assert no document accepted and no paperwork stage move.
detail_matrix.recommended_fix: document.check evidence required for doc lifecycle.

detail_matrix.how_to_reproduce: Configure critical stage move using contains on message text.
detail_matrix.recommended_test: Assert lint blocks or marks dangerous for live.

root_cause: Tool, state and workflow authority is not yet uniform across live and v2 paths.
required_tests: credit intent cannot receive cash quote
post-quote acknowledgement does not restart qualification
quote invalidates after model or plan change
por fuera resolves through credit plan tool
catalog candidate references are resolved safely
no document stage move without attachment/checklist evidence
business workflow triggers cannot be keyword-only
tool/action visible text keys are rejected
